title: The Reality Manual
_comment: THE DEV RUNNING ORDER — served at /dev only (js/main.js picks this
file over the root /book.json when location.pathname starts with
/dev). This is where new chapters/pages get drafted and reordered
while they're still being worked on: add a page here first, and it
shows up only on /dev. It is NOT copied into the public /book.json
automatically — that happens by hand, entry by entry, only once a
chapter is actually ready to go live. Until told to promote
something, assume this file may be ahead of the public one and
the public one is the one that must never regress.
Same rules otherwise as /book.json — see its own _comment.
